title: Aust's Better Leaves
description: Makes leaves appear bushy in a minimalistic way.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82b33ffcfd430314030347e78c2e57bf5e3c1eba_0.webp)
**Aust's Better Leaves makes leaves bushy in a minimalistic way. I created this pack because all the other better leaves packs were a bit too bushy for me.**

![Oak Tree On vs Off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b16fc09df9ac73f22aa80f3eb1e769ada8be5e55.png)

**The pack should be compatible with all recent versions of minecraft. When in doubt just ignore the "_This Pack was Created for an Earlier/Later Version of Minecraft_" popup, and see if it works.** 

**I use this pack in my YouTube vidoes, and you can check that out [here](https://www.youtube.com/@AustMC) if you'd like. If you have any questions, you can join my [discord server](https://discord.gg/E7UbGrQN9v) for support.**

![Bushy Leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39e4381478bb19dfe82d4b59ec9feb4dff4d2079.png)
